audit_scope: Full player journey: Menu→ParchmentPreRun/SelectionSauvegarde→HubAntre→TransitionBiome→BroceliandeForest3D→Cards→End→Hub. Delta from 2026-04-14 report.

checks.notes: Director q-20260414-005 answered 'B: Supprimer IntroPersonalityQuiz + SceneRencontreMerlin'. Both .tscn files still exist in scenes/. Task E2E-DELETE-ORPHAN-SCENES (priority 3) is pending but unexecuted.

LOAD_PROFILE action only restores state['meta']. state['run'] (life, cards, progress) is never restored. MerlinSaveSystem.load_run_state() exists but is only called in dead game_flow_controller.gd. No LOAD_RUN_STATE action in MerlinStore dispatcher. An interrupted run is silently lost.

checks.transition: Run end → faction ending choice UI
checks.notes: faction_endings_available is correctly computed in store_run.check_run_end() and passed through merlin_game_controller to show_end_screen(ending). BUT ui_overlay_endscreen.gd (active end screen) has ZERO faction handling (grep returns 0). The faction-aware EndRunScreen.gd is only wired in dead game_flow_controller path (Run3D.tscn). Players with rep >= 80 never see faction ending choice.

checks.transition: BroceliandeForest3D HUD update + card life effects
checks.notes: Lines 894+1063 use get_node_or_null('/root/GameManager').get('run_state') for HUD update and card life effects. GameManager has no 'run_state' property — state is in MerlinStore.state['run']. HUD life display and card score→life effects are broken (always fall through to defaults).

PASS in production: GameManager (autoload) adds MerlinStore via call_deferred in _ready(). By the time any user can trigger a card, MerlinStore is available. WARN: _check_run_end() has guard 'if not _store: return' which silently disables tracking if store was null at setup time.

checks.transition: New game path (ParchmentPreRun → Forest, bypasses HubAntre)
checks.notes: Same as previous audit: ParchmentPreRun routes directly to BroceliandeForest3D skipping HubAntre biome/Ogham selection. First-run player cannot choose biome or starters.

critical_findings.description: ui_overlay_endscreen.gd (the active end screen in MerlinGame.tscn) has zero faction ending support. faction_endings_available is correctly computed and passed but silently ignored. Players never see faction choice even at rep >= 80.

SelectionSauvegarde Continue dispatches LOAD_PROFILE only. state['run'] is never restored. No LOAD_RUN_STATE action in MerlinStore. save_system.load_run_state() only called in dead game_flow_controller.gd.
